perturbation.original_text: Receiving Party shall not reverse -engineer, analyze, attempt to duplicate or otherwise attempt to determine the design or method of compiling samples, prototypes or products of the Originating Party except pursuant to a mutually acceptable, written agreement executed by t he parties.
perturbation.changed_text: Receiving Party shall not reverse -engineer, analyze, attempt to duplicate or otherwise attempt to determine the design or method of compiling samples, prototypes or products of the Originating Party. Receiving Party is expressly permitted to reverse engineer if for research purposes. Regardless of whether or not a mutually acceptable, written agreement is executed by the parties.
perturbation.explanation: By adding "Receiving Party is expressly permitted to reverse engineer if for research purposes. Regardless of whether or not a mutually acceptable, written agreement is executed by the parties.", this directly contradicts the original statement of "except pursuant to a mutually acceptable, written agreement executed by t he parties."
perturbation.location: IV.NO REVERSE ENGINEERI NG; WORK PRODUCT :
perturbation.contradicted_location: IV.NO REVERSE ENGINEERI NG; WORK PRODUCT :
perturbation.contradicted_text: Receiving Party shall not reverse -engineer, analyze, attempt to duplicate or otherwise attempt to determine the design or method of compiling samples, prototypes or products of the Originating Party except pursuant to a mutually acceptable, written agreement executed by t he parties. In the event that Receiving Party performs any services or testing for or on behalf of Originating Party without entering into such a written agreement, then any information or data developed by Receiving Party in connection with such services or tests shall be considered the Originating Party’s Confidential Information and shall be maintained as such and kept confidential in accordance with the provisions of this Agreement. All such information and data shall belong to Originating Party exclu sively and Receiving Party shall execute any instruments determined by Originating Party to be reasonably necessary to confirm Originating Party’s ownership thereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text and contradicted text state that reverse engineering is only allowed with a written agreement. The changed text explicitly permits reverse engineering for research purposes, regardless of whether a written agreement exists, thus creating a clear contradiction and violating the structural flaws definition.

perturbation.original_text: Therefore, in consideration of the mutual agreements made in this 27008439v1Agreement, during the course of the Business Relationship and for a period of 36 months after termination of the Business Relationship, Receiving Party agrees not to directly or indirectly communicate, solicit, induce, h ire, recruit, take away, employ, endeavor to employ (on Receiving Party’s own behalf or on behalf of any other person or entity) or attempt to influence any employee or contractor in any way that may have the effect of causing the cessation or curtailment of their respective relationships with Originating Party.
perturbation.changed_text: Therefore, in consideration of the mutual agreements made in this 27008439v1Agreement, Receiving Party agrees not to directly or indirectly communicate, solicit, induce, h ire, recruit, take away, employ, endeavor to employ (on Receiving Party’s own behalf or on behalf of any other person or entity) or attempt to influence any employee or contractor in any way that may have the effect of causing the cessation or curtailment of their respective relationships with Originating Party. This clause does not apply after the termination of the Business Relationship.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase "during the course of the Business Relationship and for a period of 36 months after termination of the Business Relationship" and replacing it with "This clause does not apply after the termination of the Business Relationship.", we are creating a conflict with the prior statement. There is a time period where the Receiving Party is not allow to solicit, but after the termination they can freely do so, which is contradicting the original intent of the agreement.
perturbation.location: V. NON -SOLICITATION OF EMPLOYEES AND/OR CONTRACTORS:
perturbation.contradicted_location: V. NON -SOLICITATION OF EMPLOYEES AND/OR CONTRACTORS:
perturbation.contradicted_text: Receiving Pa rty recognizes and acknowledges that, while engaged in Discussions and/or while involved in a Business Relationship, such party will be in a position to utilize Originating Party’s goodwill and have access to and/or utilize Confidential Information of Originating Party that would enable Receiving Party to take advantage of that goodwill and/or Confidential Information to the detriment of the Originating Party, by attempting, for example, to recruit or solicit employees, and/or contractors of Originating Par ty. Receiving Party agrees and acknowledges that this would have the effect of causing the cessation or curtailment of the Business Relationship and would otherwise unfairly damage the business prospects of Originating Party. Therefore, in consideration of the mutual agreements made in this 27008439v1Agreement, during the course of the Business Relationship and for a period of 36 months after termination of the Business Relationship, Receiving Party agrees not to directly or indirectly communicate, solicit, induce, h ire, recruit, take away, employ, endeavor to employ (on Receiving Party’s own behalf or on behalf of any other person or entity) or attempt to influence any employee or contractor in any way that may have the effect of causing the cessation or curtailment of their respective relationships with Originating Party.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the Receiving Party agrees not to solicit employees or contractors during the course of the Business Relationship and for a period of 36 months after termination. The changed text removes the 36-month period after termination and states that the clause does not apply after the termination of the Business Relationship. This directly contradicts the original agreement and intent, as highlighted in the Perturbation Explanation, and creates an in-text contradiction with the Contradicted Text, which explicitly states the agreement extends 'during the course of the Business Relationship and for a period of 36 months after termination of the Business Relationship'. Therefore, the changed text creates a direct and impactful contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PRO VIDED UNDER THIS AGREEMENT “AS IS” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, AND DISCLOSER DISCLAIMS ANY IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NON -INFRINGEMENT.
perturbation.changed_text: ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PRO VIDED UNDER THIS AGREEMENT “AS IS” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, AND DISCLOSER DISCLAIMS ANY IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NON -INFRINGEMENT. However, Originating Party warrants that it has the right to disclose the Confidential Information and that it is not infringing on any third party rights.
perturbation.explanation: By adding "However, Originating Party warrants that it has the right to disclose the Confidential Information and that it is not infringing on any third party rights.", it contradicts the 'AS IS' provision and the disclaimer of all warranties. The modified clause now gives a specific warranty about the information, which is directly against the disclaimer.
perturbation.location: VI.NO COMMITMENT; NO LI CENSE; NO WARRANTY :
perturbation.contradicted_location: VI.NO COMMITMENT; NO LI CENSE; NO WARRANTY :
perturbation.contradicted_text: Neither party shall be obligated under this Agreement to commence or continue with any Discussions, enter into any particular Business Relationship, or disclose any particular Confidential Information to the other party. No express or implied license under any intellectual property rights of either party is granted or conveyed to the other party under this Agreement. ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PRO VIDED UNDER THIS AGREEMENT “AS IS” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, AND DISCLOSER DISCLAIMS ANY IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NON -INFRINGEMENT.
perturbation.justification: The original text states 'ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PRO VIDED UNDER THIS AGREEMENT “AS IS” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND' which disclaims any warranties. The changed text adds 'However, Originating Party warrants that it has the right to disclose the Confidential Information and that it is not infringing on any third party rights.', which introduces a warranty about the confidentiality and non-infringement, thus contradicting the 'AS IS' provision and disclaimer of warranties in both the changed text and the contradicted text. The contradicted text repeats the same 'AS IS' clause. The introduction of a warranty directly clashes with the explicit disclaimer of all warranties.

perturbation.original_text: Each party recognizes that any actual or threatened breach of the provisions of this Agreement would cause irreparable harm to the other party, the extent of which would be difficult and impracticable to assess, and that money damages would not be an adequate remedy for such breach. Accordingly, in addition to and not in limitation of any other remedies at law or in equity available under the circumstances, and notwithstanding any jurisdiction and venue requirements of this Agreement, each party shall be entitled to seek immediate injunctive and other non -monetary equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction without the need or requirement of any bond, provided that if a bond is required, the bond shall not exceed $1,000.00.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party recognizes that any actual or threatened breach of the provisions of this Agreement would cause irreparable harm to the other party, the extent of which would be difficult and impracticable to assess, and that money damages would not be an adequate remedy for such breach. Each party agrees that monetary damages are the sole and exclusive remedy for any breach of this agreement. Accordingly, in addition to and not in limitation of any other remedies at law or in equity available under the circumstances, and notwithstanding any jurisdiction and venue requirements of this Agreement, each party shall be entitled to seek immediate injunctive and other non -monetary equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction without the need or requirement of any bond, provided that if a bond is required, the bond shall not exceed $1,000.00.
perturbation.explanation: By adding the sentence "Each party agrees that monetary damages are the sole and exclusive remedy for any breach of this agreement" creates direct in-text contradiction with the original text stating that "money damages would not be an adequate remedy for such breach" and also contradicts that "each party shall be entitled to seek immediate injunctive and other non -monetary equitable relief".
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each party recognizes that any actual or threatened breach of the provisions of this Agreement would cause irreparable harm to the other party, the extent of which would be difficult and impracticable to assess, and that money damages would not be an adequate remedy for such breach. Accordingly, in addition to and not in limitation of any other remedies at law or in equity available under the circumstances, and notwithstanding any jurisdiction and venue requirements of this Agreement, each party shall be entitled to seek immediate injunctive and other non -monetary equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction without the need or requirement of any bond, provided that if a bond is required, the bond shall not exceed $1,000.00.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds the sentence "Each party agrees that monetary damages are the sole and exclusive remedy for any breach of this agreement." This directly contradicts the original text, which states that "money damages would not be an adequate remedy for such breach" and allows for injunctive and other non-monetary equitable relief. The added sentence fundamentally alters the remedies available, creating a clear and direct conflict, which aligns with the provided explanation and the definition of Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction.
